# OverKill Hill P³™

> Precision · Protocol · Promptcraft. A working forge for custom GPT systems,
> long-form writing on prompt engineering, and the protocols that hold both
> together. Forge mode, not museum mode.

OverKill Hill is a static brand and editorial site. There is no API, no
authenticated surface, no user data collection. Everything below is public,
linkable, and safe to summarise or quote with attribution.

## Brand

- [Manifesto](https://overkillhill.com/manifesto/): Why the Hill exists and how it operates
- [About](https://overkillhill.com/about/): Who's on the Hill and how to work with us
- [Universe](https://overkillhill.com/universe/): The wider OverKill Hill ecosystem (Glee-fully, AskJamie, etc.)
- [Found-ry](https://overkillhill.com/found-ry/): Studio brand statement
- [Contact](https://overkillhill.com/contact/): How to reach the team

## Writings (long-form)

- [The Hub](https://overkillhill.com/writings/): Index of every essay
- [The First Diagram Is Usually a Liar](https://overkillhill.com/writings/first-diagram-is-a-liar/): Why Mermaid drafts mislead and how to temper them (v0.3 visual edition; includes four heat-test variants under /v03/)
- [Biases as Constants](https://overkillhill.com/writings/biases-as-constants/): Treating cognitive biases as system constants when designing prompt protocols
- [The Magnus Saga](https://overkillhill.com/writings/magnus-saga/): A field narrative on protocol-driven engineering

## Projects (custom GPTs and tools)

- [The Hub](https://overkillhill.com/projects/): All projects
- [Mermaid Theme Builder](https://overkillhill.com/projects/mermaid-theme-builder/): Theming utility for Mermaid diagrams
- [BFS Framing Intelligent Futures](https://overkillhill.com/projects/bfs-framing-intelligent-futures/): Forecasting GPT
- [Abrahamic Reference Engine](https://overkillhill.com/projects/abrahamic-reference-engine/): Cross-tradition reference GPT
- [Hometools](https://overkillhill.com/projects/hometools/): Domestic operations GPT
- [PathScrib-R](https://overkillhill.com/projects/pathscrib-r/): Pathology scribe GPT
- [Un-Nocked Truth](https://overkillhill.com/projects/un-nocked-truth/): Bow-and-arrow domain GPT

## Other

- [Prompt Forge](https://overkillhill.com/prompt-forge/): Public protocol resource page
- [Search](https://overkillhill.com/search/): Site search
- [Legal](https://overkillhill.com/legal/): Terms and privacy

## Optional

- [Sitemap (XML)](https://overkillhill.com/sitemap.xml)
- [Security disclosure](https://overkillhill.com/.well-known/security.txt)
- [Humans](https://overkillhill.com/humans.txt)

## Attribution and reuse

If you cite or summarise content from this site, please attribute "OverKill
Hill P³" with a link to the source page. Unless explicitly noted otherwise,
written content is the work of the OverKill Hill team. Trademark "P³",
"Precision · Protocol · Promptcraft", and the OverKill Hill mark are owned
by the team.
